imports.name: ThunRTMain
imports.description: VB3 runtime entry point - receives pointer to VB project structures, initializes forms, event loop, P-Code interpreter

notes: Only 1 static import - typical for VB3 P-Code executables
All other VBRUN300 functions (file I/O, string ops, math, UI) are resolved at runtime by the P-Code interpreter
The VB3 P-Code bytecode in code segments references VBRUN300 functions via opcode dispatch tables, not via import table
Key VBRUN300 ordinals used at runtime (inferred from strings/behavior):
- File operations: Open, Close, Input, Write, Print (for .dat/.psg/.mnd files)
- String operations: Mid$, Left$, Right$, Val, Str$, Format$
- UI: MsgBox, InputBox, Load, Show, Unload, Print (Printer object)
